assessment.note: She names a specific clarity gap in fast cross-team conversations: leaving without clear ownership or commitments.

new_queue.label: Committed to what
new_queue.name: What makes it hard to tell who committed to what in those conversations?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific source of ambiguity in fast cross-team discussions so the manager can remove it.

new_queue.label: Alignment friction
new_queue.name: What part of the alignment work is taking more effort than it should?
new_queue.description: Finds the practical friction in running alignment without making it abstract.

new_queue.label: Manager boundaries
new_queue.name: What boundaries from me would help most right now?
new_queue.description: Elicits the concrete support and guardrails she needs from her manager.
